text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see posters like this, I remember
home.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Our bar's customers were such jokers. They'd
dance around while singing karaoke and other
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but thanks to that, I'm pretty good at all
the winning concert songs.
